# TAG Parking - Bournemouth Airport Meet & Greet Parking

> TAG Parking is the meet-and-greet parking service at Bournemouth Airport (BOH). Drive to the terminal, hand your keys to a TAG driver, fly — and when you land, your car is waiting at the terminal. Rated 5.0 on Google with 380+ five-star reviews. Typically significantly cheaper than the airport's own car parks.

## What We Do

TAG Parking removes the worst parts of airport parking: no distant car parks, no transfer buses, and no waiting around on your return. A professional, insured TAG driver meets you at the terminal drop-off area at your booked time, checks your car over with you (photos and mileage recorded), and parks it in a secure monitored compound. We track your return flight and are already waiting with your car when you walk out of arrivals — even if your flight is delayed. Customers do not need to phone ahead at either end.

## Why Travellers Choose TAG

- **Cheaper than the airport**: our live price comparison typically shows large savings against Bournemouth Airport's own parking, especially against Premium Parking
- **Zero waiting on return**: your flight is tracked; the car and driver are at the terminal when you land, roughly 30 minutes after touchdown (time to clear arrivals)
- **No transfer bus**: you are dropped and collected at the terminal itself
- **Delay-proof**: flight delayed? We monitor it and adjust — you have nothing to arrange
- **Trusted**: 5.0 Google rating, 380+ five-star reviews, family-run, featured in the Bournemouth Daily Echo

## How It Works

1. **Book online** at https://www.tagparking.co.uk — takes a few minutes, secure payment by Stripe
2. **Choose your drop-off time**: we offer arrival slots 2¾, 2, or 1½ hours before your departure (earliest drop-off 04:00)
3. **Drop off**: meet your TAG driver at the Bournemouth Airport terminal drop-off area; quick handover with vehicle check, photos and mileage
4. **Fly**: your car sits in a secure, monitored compound while you're away
5. **Return**: we track your landing; your car and driver are waiting at the terminal — typically 30 minutes after you touch down
6. **Drive home**: load your bags and go

## Pricing

- Short stays from around £69; longer stays offer progressively better per-day value
- The price at booking is the full price — no hidden fees or surprise extras
- 10% promotional discount codes are frequently available on the website
- Live comparison against Bournemouth Airport's own parking prices shown at booking

## Booking, Changes and Cancellation

- Book, amend or cancel online 24/7
- **Free cancellation**: cancel 24 hours or more before your departure time for a 100% refund
- If your **airline cancels your flight**, we refund in full regardless of notice, on proof of cancellation
- Confirmation email at booking, plus a reminder email 2 days before travel with exactly what to do on the day

## Coverage

- **Airport**: Bournemouth Airport (BOH), Christchurch/Bournemouth, Dorset, UK
- **Address**: Bournemouth Airport, Chapel Gate, Bournemouth BH23 6SE
- Serves all airlines operating from Bournemouth, including Ryanair, Jet2 and TUI Airways
- Early-morning departures fully covered (drop-offs from 04:00) and late-night arrivals met after midnight

## Common Questions

- **Do I need to call when I land?** No. We track your flight and are already there.
- **What if my flight is delayed?** We monitor it and meet the actual arrival — no action needed from you.
- **How early can I drop my car off?** From 04:00; you choose a slot 2¾, 2, or 1½ hours before departure when booking.
- **Is my car secure?** Yes — a monitored secure compound, with a documented handover (photos and mileage) at drop-off and your own check-over at return.
- **Who drives my car?** Professional, insured TAG drivers in identifiable TAG clothing.

## Contact

- **Website**: https://www.tagparking.co.uk
- **Book direct**: https://www.tagparking.co.uk/tag-it
- **FAQ**: https://www.tagparking.co.uk/faq
- **Email**: info@tagparking.co.uk

## Popular Destinations from Bournemouth

Faro, Alicante, Malaga, Palma de Mallorca, Tenerife, Lanzarote, Antalya, Corfu and other holiday routes served by Ryanair, Jet2 and TUI from Bournemouth Airport.
